title: Springbok Supermoon set to light up SA skies this week
description: NATIONAL NEWS - We’re in for a...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"NATIONAL NEWS - We’re in for a celestial treat as the final supermoon of 2025 graces the night sky this week.","html":"NATIONAL NEWS - We’re in for a celestial treat as the final supermoon of 2025 graces the night sky this week."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Zululand Observer reports that, on Thursday, the moon will shine as the brightest object overhead, offering a broad viewing window for skywatchers across South Africa.","html":"Zululand Observer reports that, on Thursday, the moon will shine as the brightest object overhead, offering a broad viewing window for skywatchers across South Africa."},{"type":"heading","text":"What is a supermoon?","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A full moon is dubbed a supermoon when it occurs near perigee, the moon’s closest point to Earth.","html":"A full moon is dubbed a supermoon when it occurs near perigee, the moon’s closest point to Earth."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"At this distance, Nasa notes that the lunar disk can appear 14% larger and up to 33% brighter than a full moon seen at its farthest point, known as apogee.","html":"At this distance, Nasa notes that the lunar disk can appear 14% larger and up to 33% brighter than a full moon seen at its farthest point, known as apogee."},{"type":"heading","text":"What is this supermoon?","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This final supermoon is known as the Springbok Moon in South Africa, but the Cold Moon in the northern hemisphere. It marks the end of the 2025 supermoon season.","html":"This final supermoon is known as the Springbok Moon in South Africa, but the Cold Moon in the northern hemisphere. It marks the end of the 2025 supermoon season."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Supermoons tend to arrive in clusters owing to the moon’s slightly oval orbit, which brings it closer to Earth at certain times of the year.","html":"Supermoons tend to arrive in clusters owing to the moon’s slightly oval orbit, which brings it closer to Earth at certain times of the year."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"When this coincides with the full moon phase, we get the dramatic, oversized lunar view that makes supermoons so memorable.","html":"When this coincides with the full moon phase, we get the dramatic, oversized lunar view that makes supermoons so memorable."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The Springbok Moon or Cold Moon will reach its peak brightness on Thursday night, remaining visible throughout the night in South Africa."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Even if clouds roll in, the moon will appear more than 90% full between 2 and 6 December, ensuring plenty of opportunities to witness it.","html":"Even if clouds roll in, the moon will appear more than 90% full between 2 and 6 December, ensuring plenty of opportunities to witness it."},{"type":"heading","text":"How to view the supermoon","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"No telescope is required to enjoy the spectacle; simply step outside after sunset, find an open horizon, and, if you like, bring a pair of binoculars to pick out the moon’s craters and ridges.","html":"No telescope is required to enjoy the spectacle; simply step outside after sunset, find an open horizon, and, if you like, bring a pair of binoculars to pick out the moon’s craters and ridges."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Regardless of where you are on Earth, you’ll see the same phase of the moon.","html":"Regardless of where you are on Earth, you’ll see the same phase of the moon."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"However, observers in the northern and southern hemispheres see the moon orientated differently with respect to the horizon.","html":"However, observers in the northern and southern hemispheres see the moon orientated differently with respect to the horizon."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Don’t miss out on seeing nature in all its glory on Thursday!","html":"Don’t miss out on seeing nature in all its glory on Thursday!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Article: Caxton Network News","html":"Article: Caxton Network News"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Springbok Supermoon set to light up SA skies this week
